cases.name: allowed_public_read
cases.expected: resolver executes and one tenant-scoped trusted-IP key is consumed

cases.name: read_limit_exceeded
cases.expected: GraphQL error contains BLOG_RATE_LIMITED, surface, limit, and retryAfter extensions

cases.name: authorized_write
cases.expected: write limiter key uses authenticated user identity and operation surface

cases.name: unauthorized_write
cases.expected: module limiter is skipped so resolver authentication and RBAC remain authoritative

cases.name: moderation_write
cases.expected: blog_posts:manage maps to the dedicated moderate_comment surface

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute the integration target against the configured in-memory limiter
execute mounted GraphQL requests against Redis-backed host composition
retain HTTP Retry-After and GraphQL extension evidence
retain publication, channel visibility, tenant isolation, and RBAC non-regression evidence
